title: Granjas 4 Irmãos SA - Agropecuária, Indústria e Comércio ransomware incident

victim.name: Granjas 4 Irmãos SA - Agropecuária, Indústria e Comércio

extortion.description: [AI generated] Granjas 4 Irmãos SA - Agropecuária, Indústria e Comércio is a Brazilian company involved in agricultural activities, industry, and trade. It specializes in the production of grains, meats, and other agricultural commodities. The company uses modern farming techniques to raise livestock and cultivate crops, contributing to Brazil's agricultural industry. While it has a substantial domestic presence, it also partakes in trade, distributing its produce to various other regions.
